rules.source_excerpt: Preferred vendor purchase requisitions below $5,000 are pre-approved.

rules.description: Manager approval required for PRs between $5,000 and $25,000
rules.source_excerpt: Purchase requisitions between $5,000 and $25,000 require manager approval.

rules.description: Executive approval process required for PRs above $25,000
rules.source_excerpt: Purchase requisitions above $25,000 must follow the executive approval process.
